findings.annotation_source: Supplementary Table 3 provides DEGs used to annotate Early LE in prenatal skin. Listed as fine-grained annotation under broad 'Lymphatic endothelium' category.
findings.abbreviation: LE is defined as 'lymphatic endothelium' in the Fig. 1 legend.
findings.temporal_presence: Endothelial cells including lymphatic endothelium are present throughout gestation (Fig. 1c, Extended Data Fig. 1d, Supplementary Table 4).
findings.microenvironment: Endothelial cells co-locate with macrophages in neurovascular microenvironments (Fig. 1d).
